LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALI AZHAR'S AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RELIEF UNDER CAL. CIV. PROC. 473(B) BECAUSE THE DEFAULT WAS ENTERED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY'S MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. DEFENDANT MAY FILE HIS PROPOSED ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS TO PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B) IN THE AMOUNT OF $585.00. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALI AZHAR's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Off calendar as duplicate entry. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALI AZHAR's AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is granted. Defendant is entitled to relief under Cal. Civ. Proc. 473(b) because the default was entered due to Defendant's insurance company's mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. Defendant may file his proposed answer within 10 days. Defendant is ordered to pay reasonable attorney's fees and costs to Plaintiff pursuant to CCP 473(b) in the amount of $585.00. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
